channel.title: BOSAI on The Guyana Brief
channel.description: Recent content in BOSAI on The Guyana Brief

item.title: Daily Brief – Friday, April 3, 2026
item.description: Your Good Friday morning roundup — Guyana hit with a 38% Trump tariff, government secretly paid US$82M to gas plant contractor, fake tint waiver medical certificates discovered, BOSAI fires the worker who won a pay raise, and Exxon exits the Canje Block.
